rootCause: Commit 09692754c947152d8a6f517591b5cf11ae1dceb5 reintroduced state replacement in setCurrentDialogueStep (gameState.quests[questId] = { stepId }). Advancing dialogue overwrote quest-specific fields like itemsClaimed, so grantsItems options became claimable again after navigation.
resolution: Preserve existing quest progress fields when writing stepId/finished and harden claim writes to initialize missing quest progress before appending itemsClaimed. Added regression tests covering claim-once behavior across dialogue-step transitions.
